name: Remember User
description: Patch keyed facts about the current user (role, timezone, preferences, ongoing projects). Updates one fact at a time WITHOUT erasing the others. Use op='upsert' for a new/changed fact, 'append' to add to an existing one, 'remove' to forget a fact.

args.name: key
args.description: Fact name, e.g. 'role', 'timezone', 'current_project'. Reserved key 'freeform' holds general free-text notes.

args.name: value
args.description: Fact value. Required for upsert/append; ignored for remove.

args.name: facts
args.description: Batch: list of {key, value} objects to upsert/append/remove together.

args.name: notes
args.description: Legacy free-form notes; stored under the 'freeform' key (does not wipe structured facts).
